totpSubtitleAuthenticator: Open your authenticator app and enter the 6-digit code.
totpSubtitleBackup: Enter one of your backup codes.
lockout: Too many attempts. Try again in {time}.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.passwordMinLength: Password must contain at least 8 characters.
validation.totpCodeRequired: Please enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.

toast.checkRequiredFieldsMessage: Please resolve the highlighted fields before continuing.
toast.welcomeBackMessage: Login successful. Opening your admin dashboard...
toast.adminAccessRequiredMessage: This account does not have admin privileges for the console.
toast.tooManyAttemptsMessage: Too many attempts. Try again in {minutes, plural, one {# minute} other {# minutes}}.
toast.invalidCredentialsMessage: Wrong email or password. Please try again.
toast.accountInactiveMessage: This account is not active. Contact support for assistance.
toast.serviceTemporarilyUnavailableMessage: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
toast.serverUnavailableMessage: The server is temporarily unavailable. Please try again.
toast.unexpectedLoginErrorMessage: Unexpected error while logging in. Please try again.
toast.sessionExpiredMessage: Verification timed out. Please sign in again.
